description: PreToolUse Hook command classification database. Loaded once at startup into a hash map for O(1) lookup.

risk_legend.low: Changes that are easily reversible or localized (creating files, copying data, setting env vars)
risk_legend.medium: Changes that affect system configuration, service state, or persistent storage but are generally recoverable
risk_legend.high: Destructive operations causing irreversible data loss, permanent resource deletion, or security-compromising changes

PowerShell.description: PowerShell cmdlets — classified primarily by approved verb

read_only.name: grep
read_only.description: Search text patterns (read-only, no -i or redirection)

read_only.name: curl GET
read_only.description: HTTP GET request (with or without flags before URL)

read_only.name: git pull
read_only.description: Fetch and integrate (may modify working tree)

modifying.name: docker rm
modifying.description: Remove container (data lost if no volume)

AWS_CLI.description: AWS CLI commands — classified by service and operation verb
